rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TAKEO JOHN KITAMATA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to october 17, 2018. new notice is required (see LRSF 14.21.A. - notice cannot be mailed until the pleading requiring notice is filed). in addition, no file stamped copy of the amnended petition was delivered to the examiner. new deadline for curing the defects in order to avoid an automatic continuance is Thursday, October 11, 2018. please note-->faxed or emailed copies are NOT accepted. a revised order is required that lists Order for Final Distribution first in the caption and actually states to whom the property is to be distributed (order merely says as noted above, but there is nothing in the findings stating to whom the property should pass).

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required by petitioner. an attorney in fact will not be allowed to represent petitioner as that person is not a licensed attorney. in addition, prior to the hearing, a verified supplement must be filed that does the following: cures the defective verification of the petition (not dated), see LRSF 14.18; changes the allegation re the petitioner from 1.b.(2) to 1.b.(1); addresses why the hospital states their records show the mother's name as Gazowsky; attaches page 27 of the passport; states which documents were provided to obtain the passport; and explains why the copy of the passport filed shows the passport is not signed. Please note, normally, as petitioner did not include an email address on the pleadings, these notes would be sent by US Mail, but these petitions are set so quickly there is no time to get notes to New York in time for these issues to be addressed.
